title: Oil: Brent settles at $105.33 (+0.3%), WTI $94.40 (-1.5%); weekly gains Brent +16%, WTI +14%
snippet: Brent settled 0.25% higher at $105.30/bbl. WTI retreated 1.51% to $94.40/bbl. From last Friday close: Brent +16%, WTI +14%. Since conflict start: Brent +40%+ year-to-date. Prices pulled back from early gains on Pakistan talks hope then fell further on Trump cancellation.
